highlights: Automated Jira extraction workflows on AWS Lambda and modeled outputs in DynamoDB.
Simplified downstream reporting by reducing multi-stage joins into single-table access patterns.
Compared deterministic, stochastic, and RL approaches for hospital inventory optimization.
Delivered recommendations balancing resilience, cost, and scalability under demand uncertainty.
Architected and deployed multi-model chatbots integrating Claude, OpenAI, and Gemini APIs.
Built a RAG pipeline with Pinecone + Gemini for candidate-job matching.
